draft.Description: Concise knowledge base entry for 'Prefer strict tables in SQLite' with specified constraints
draft.key_takeaways: Contrarian perspective on SQLite schema design emphasizing data integrity over flexibility
interesting_quotes: SQLite’s reputation for simplicity often masks the cost of loose schemas
Strict tables aren’t about rigidity—they’re about preventing the kind of data errors that cost hours to fix
potential_discussion_topics: How might strict constraints impact your migration strategy when transitioning from loose schemas?
